creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to rozhuk.im from comment #3)
> It uses gtk-doc generate all documets, they installed in gtk-doc.

The choice of toolchain for documentation preparation/presentation seems rather irrelevant to the name of the option. It's still "documentation".

> And this is not user docs, this for developers.

Yes, well, it's a library, the target audience is developers (it doesn't even install user-visible (heck, any) tools).

Some grepping shows that there's no clear consensus on the DOCS/GTKDOC issue across all the ports. I'm not changing this for cosmetics on a single person's (sorry) request unless there's some policy (or another important reason). The churn and rebuilds are not worth it.
